channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Xbox Full Screen Experience shows a potential glimpse of how Project Helix will work – though right now, it’s a flawed PC platform - Rock Paper Shotgun
item.description:
1. Xbox Full Screen Experience shows a potential glimpse of how Project Helix will work – though right now, it’s a flawed PC platform  Rock Paper Shotgun
  2. GDC 2026: Announcing new tools and platform updates for Windows PC game developers  Windows Blog
  3. Microsoft’s ‘Xbox mode’ is coming to every Windows 11 PC  The Verge
  4. Windows 11’s Steam Deck-ish, streamlined Xbox gaming UI comes to all PCs in April  Ars Technica
  5. Microsoft's 'Xbox Mode' Coming to Windows 11 PCs Next Month  PCMag

item.title: The iPhone 18e will do the job… if the job is to put in the absolute minimum effort - PhoneArena
item.description:
1. The iPhone 18e will do the job… if the job is to put in the absolute minimum effort  PhoneArena
  2. Apple Has Apparently Already Finalized iPhone 18e  MacRumors
  3. iPhone 17e Goes On Sale March 11, But Apple Preparing For iPhone 18e Already  NDTV Profit
  4. Apple Has Already Started Beating The Drumbeats For The iPhone 18e  Wccftech
  5. The Ink Isn’t Dry on the iPhone 17e, and the 18e is Already “Finalized”  vocal.media

item.title: The MacBook is Going Ultra: Everything We Know About Apple’s Rumored $2,500 Powerhouse - Geeky Gadgets
item.description:
1. The MacBook is Going Ultra: Everything We Know About Apple’s Rumored $2,500 Powerhouse  Geeky Gadgets
  2. Apple ‘Ultra’ Products Expansion Is Up Next After MacBook Neo Launch  Bloomberg.com
  3. Apple plans a 'high-end' Ultra line, including iPhone Fold, report says  Mashable
  4. Apple Planning 'MacBook Ultra' With Touchscreen and Higher Price  MacRumors
  5. iPhone Fold will be called iPhone Ultra, guesses new leaker  AppleInsider
